rationale_source: Wrong-doc-uploaded per Layer 3 #5 — filename routes to one classification but content doesn't match; spec assumes filename-classification dominates per placeholder

first_mortgage_balance.rationale: File classified as mortgage_statement by filename but contains loan_app content; F1.FB doesn't extract from loan_app content under statement label.
